nodes.recentposition: Marketing Administrative Assistant at DPM Link, Remote
nodes.bios: Hello there!! My name is Kelsie Kim, and I initiated in the spring quarter of my second year. In my free time, I enjoy all mediums of art, spending time with friends, and discovering new music! Ask me about my favorite shows/movies, all the dream jobs I had while growing up or anything really! Looking forward to meeting you! :^)
